# project
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15.0)
cmake_policy(SET CMP0091 NEW)
project(WorldX LANGUAGES CXX)
set(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID ${CMAKE_CXX_COMPILER_ID})

# target
add_library(WorldX SHARED "")
set_target_properties(WorldX PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME "WorldX")
set_target_properties(WorldX PROPERTIES RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin")
set_target_properties(WorldX PROPERTIES ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin")
target_include_directories(WorldX PRIVATE

target_compile_definitions(WorldX PRIVATE
    NOMINMAX
    UNICODE
    _SILENCE_ALL_CXX17_DEPRECATION_WARNINGS
    ENTT_PACKED_PAGE=128
    ENTT_SPARSE_PAGE=2048
    ENTT_NO_MIXIN
    LL_PLAT_S
)
target_compile_options(WorldX PRIVATE
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:/EHa>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:/EHa>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:/utf-8>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:/utf-8>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:/W4>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:/W4>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:/IC:/Users/ACER/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/l/levilamina/26.10.9/53c92fa16ac043cf9cc7650c73093ef4/include>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:/IC:/Users/ACER/AppData/Local/.xmake/packages/l/levilamina/26.10.9/53c92fa16ac043cf9cc7650c73093ef4/include>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:-DNDEBUG>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>:/utf-8>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CUDA>:-DNDEBUG>
)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(WorldX PRIVATE /EHsc)
elseif(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "Clang")
    target_compile_options(WorldX PRIVATE -fexceptions)
    target_compile_options(WorldX PRIVATE -fcxx-exceptions)
elseif(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "GNU")
    target_compile_options(WorldX PRIVATE -fexceptions)
endif()
set_target_properties(WorldX PROPERTIES CXX_EXTENSIONS OFF)
target_compile_features(WorldX PRIVATE cxx_std_20)
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(WorldX PRIVATE $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-O2>)
else()
    target_compile_options(WorldX PRIVATE -O3)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    target_compile_options(WorldX PRIVATE -Zi)
else()
    target_compile_options(WorldX PRIVATE -g)
endif()
if(CURRENT_COMPILER_ID STREQUAL "MSVC")
    set_property(TARGET WorldX PROPERTY
        MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY "MultiThreadedDLL")
endif()
target_link_libraries(WorldX PRIVATE
    LeviLamina
    fmt
    leveldb
    snappy
    SymbolProvider
)

)
target_link_options(WorldX PRIVATE
    /DELAYLOAD:bedrock_runtime.dll
)
# private sourcefiles from sourcebatch c++.build for target WorldX
target_sources(WorldX PRIVATE 
    src/WorldX.cpp
)
# private headers for target WorldX
